Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 15 

BENE_DEATH_DT_VRFY_CD 

LABEL: Death Date Verification Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating whether the beneficiary's date of death has been verified the Social Security 
Administration (SSA) or originated from a claim record. 

SHORT NAME: DEATHCD 

LONG NAME: BENE_DEATH_DT_VRFY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Null = Default 
V = Valid death date 

COMMENT: This field is
